programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life.  Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.
